# Pipe-separated: <expected_label>|<string-that-must-be-redacted>
# Blank lines and #-prefixed lines are ignored.
#
# Test contract: expected_label must appear in Decision.MatchedRules AND
# the original secret string must not appear in the redacted output.
# Multiple labels firing on the same input is fine — we only check that
# the named one did AND that the content is scrubbed.

# password
password|password=hunter2
password|password: supersecret
password|PASSWORD=MySecret!
password|my_password = value123
password|Password: abc_def_ghi

# api_key
api_key|api_key=abc123xyz
api_key|API-KEY: 1234abcd
api_key|apikey=foo-bar-baz
api_key|api_key : val1
api_key|API_KEY=prod-key-789

# token
token|token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9
token|TOKEN: xyzvalueabc
token|token:  leadingspace
token|Token=somelongvaluehere

# secret
secret|secret=topsecret
secret|SECRET: abcdef
secret|secret : longvalue-with-dashes
secret|Secret=another

# bearer
bearer|Authorization: Bearer abc.def.ghi
bearer|bearer XyZ-_.123
bearer|BEARER sometokenlike
bearer|bearer  doublespaceafterkeyword

# aws_akia
aws_akia|AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE
aws_akia|creds contain AKIA1234567890ABCDEF inline
aws_akia|AKIAZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZ

# aws_asia
aws_asia|ASIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE
aws_asia|session ref ASIA1234567890ABCDEF here

# aws_key_id
aws_key_id|aws_access_key_id=AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE
aws_key_id|AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID: AKIAZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZ

# aws_secret
aws_secret|aws_secret_access_key=wJalrXUtnFEMI/K7MDENG/bPxRfiCYEXAMPLEKEY
aws_secret|AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY: somesecretvalue

# github_pat — standalone (no "token:" prefix, which would cause the token regex to fire first)
github_pat|ghp_abcdef1234567890ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPqrst
github_pat|ghp_AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
github_pat|release includes ghp_1234567890123456789012345678901234ab

# github_fine_grained — 82 chars after the prefix
github_fine_grained|github_pat_11AAAAAAAA0123456789abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ

# slack_token
slack_token|xoxb-1234567890-abcdefghijklmnop
slack_token|xoxp-1234567890-abcdef
slack_token|xoxa-tokenabcdefghij
slack_token|xoxr-abcdefghij1234567890
slack_token|xoxs-abcdefghij

# pem_block
pem_block|-----BEGIN PRIVATE KEY-----
pem_block|-----BEGIN RSA PRIVATE KEY-----
pem_block|-----BEGIN OPENSSH PRIVATE KEY-----
pem_block|-----BEGIN EC PRIVATE KEY-----
pem_block|-----BEGIN DSA PRIVATE KEY-----
pem_block|-----BEGIN PGP PRIVATE KEY-----

# jwt — three base64url segments
jwt|eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJzdWIiOiIxMjM0NTY3ODkwIn0.SflKxwRJSMeKKF2QT4fwpMeJf36POk6yJV_adQssw5c
jwt|header eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QifQ.eyJ1c2VyIjoiYWxpY2UifQ.abc-def_GHI trailer
